_backup_meta.purpose: Pre-migration backup before n8n_chat_histories switchover (Step 1 read path, then Step 2 node removal). See docs/MIGRATION-n8n-chat-storage.md.

nodes._note: Capture Metrics, AI Agent, Chat Memory, all tools, and all other nodes — full workflow body is recoverable via `n8n_get_workflow id=6hz22YdBC500tHxg mode=full`. This file captures the two write nodes that will be removed in Step 2, plus the connection map below.

_connections_to_restore_in_step_2_rollba.Select Conversation -> Save User Message: Currently the path. In Step 2 it becomes Select Conversation -> AI Agent directly.
_connections_to_restore_in_step_2_rollba.Capture Metrics -> Save Assistant Messag: Currently the path. In Step 2 it becomes Capture Metrics -> Touch Conversation directly.
